raw_transcript: The gold standard is a test called Esophageal Manometry. We'll pass a thin, pressure-sensitive tube through your nose and down into your esophagus while you take sips of water. It measures the strength and coordination of your swallows.
final_corrected_note: The gold standard is a test called Esophageal Manometry. We'll pass a thin, pressure-sensitive tube through your nose and down into your esophagus while you take sips of water. It measures the strength and coordination of your swallows.
